rationale: Concentrate forces for a decisive northern offensive to exploit enemy overextension and break defensive stalemate.
Disrupt Tethys’ command-and-control systems to degrade coordination during the planned offensive.
Conduct high-visibility naval deployment to project strength domestically and deter third-party intervention.
Stage a provocation to justify escalation and fracture international support for Tethys.
Cripple key pipeline nodes to pressure Tethys economically while masking Novaris’ role.
Leak selectively manipulated data to sow distrust between Tethys and its allies.
Secure critical imports now to insulate against worsening sanctions and supply chain collapse.
Mobilize domestic capital to fund military operations without triggering inflationary spirals.
Devalue the ruble to boost export competitiveness in non-sanctioning markets and offset lost energy revenue.
Disrupt Novaris' forward supply depots to delay their consolidation and signal resolve without triggering full escalation.
Position fast-attack craft along Tethys' coastal energy transit zones to asymmetrically threaten Novaris’ revenue flow and force naval diversion.
Conduct high-visibility mobile drills near northern border to boost domestic morale and signal allied readiness, leveraging pop-up defense networks.
Deploy deep-agent cells to disable key rail chokepoints in Novaris’ rear logistics network, degrading their mobilization timeline.
Launch disruptive cyber operations against Novaris’ military scheduling systems to create fog in deployment planning.
Stage plausible deniability incidents to discredit Novaris’ narrative of victimhood in neutral states, fracturing their diplomatic support.
Forge a binding mutual support pact with conditional basing rights to lock in allied commitments before Novaris intensifies pressure.
Initiate discreet talks through third-party envoys to explore off-ramps, preserving diplomatic flexibility if military situation deteriorates.
Establish monitored corridors to position ourselves as responsible actors, drawing international oversight to Novaris’ territorial advances.
Impose targeted restrictions on critical rare earth exports to choke Novaris’ defense manufacturing capacity and exploit supply chain fragility.
Accelerate reserves of fuel, medical supplies, and microchips to extend endurance beyond six-month threshold and deter economic exhaustion.
Issue sovereign defense bonds with diaspora-first terms to unlock non-inflationary funding while deepening national unity.
